prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia watches a data pipeline finally run smoothly. Daily K-line cards flow into a local database box; a progress badge says "跑起来". In the background, unresolved future cards wait: "分时", "ETF", "其他市场".

Core meaning: after many data-source detours, the immediate priority is to get the program running, with later problems deferred.

Style: clean Chinese technical blog illustration, optimistic but grounded, white space, black/red/white, small blue success lights. Minimal labels: "先跑起来", "之后再说".

Avoid triumphant money imagery, avoid cluttered dashboard.
